case_title: CLARA M. BARNES VS. WYETH LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-03-2014 CONTINUED TO APR-01-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF COORDINATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARNES, CLARA M. AS TO DEFENDANT WYETH LLC JOHN DOE DRUG COMPANY DEFENDANTS (1-500) JANE DOE DRUG DISTRIBUTOR DEFENDANTS (1-500) JIM DOE HEALTH CARE PROVIDERS (1-500) JILL DOE (1-500) SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-03-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-10-2014 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
